title: rivea tiliifolia
intro: Rivea tiliifolia, also known as moonflower or queen of the night, is a flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and flavonoids, which possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The medicinal properties of Rivea tiliifolia have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, pain, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Rivea tiliifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
